structures.name: Program Header
structures.description: Program documentation including purpose, execution mode, portability notes, and maintenance log.

structures.name: IDENTIFICATION DIVISION
structures.description: Declares the program name VSCBEX02 and uniquely identifies the compilation unit.

structures.name: FILE-CONTROL
structures.description: Defines the indexed input file, its physical assignment, record key, access mode, and file status handling.

structures.name: INFile FD
structures.description: Defines the indexed file record structure using the shared CUSTOMER copybook.

structures.name: WORKING-STORAGE SECTION
structures.description: Declares file status fields, record counters, and end-of-job message constants.

structures.name: 0000-Mainline
structures.description: Top-level control flow coordinating initialization, iterative record processing, and program termination.

structures.name: 1000-Begin-Job
structures.description: Opens the indexed input file and primes processing by performing the first file read.

structures.name: 2000-Process
structures.description: Sequentially processes each indexed record by displaying it and advancing the file cursor.

structures.name: 5000-Read-INFile
structures.description: Reads the next indexed record, updates counters, detects end-of-file, and handles read errors.

structures.name: 3000-End-Job
structures.description: Displays execution summary statistics and closes the indexed file.

structures.name: Read Error Path
structures.description: Handles abnormal read conditions by displaying diagnostics, performing cleanup, setting return code, and terminating execution.
